message:
feat(fcp-store): add symbol repair orchestration and coverage verification

Enhances the storage layer with automated repair capabilities and
improved coverage tracking.

repair.rs:
- Add RepairOrchestrator for coordinating symbol reconstruction
- Implement repair prioritization based on coverage health
- Add repair progress tracking with detailed status
- Support parallel repair operations with rate limiting
- Add repair history and audit logging
- Implement repair policies (eager, lazy, scheduled)

symbol_store.rs:
- Add symbol verification with checksum validation
- Implement symbol migration between storage tiers
- Add symbol access pattern tracking for cache optimization
- Support symbol compression and decompression
- Add batch symbol operations for efficiency

coverage.rs:
- Refine coverage evaluation with repair hints
- Add coverage trend analysis

Cargo.toml:
- Add dependencies for repair orchestration

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,6 +35,7 @@ chrono.workspace = true
 uuid.workspace = true
 rand.workspace = true
 criterion = { version = "0.5", features = ["html_reports"] }
+fcp-testkit = { path = "../fcp-testkit", default-features = false }
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "symbol_store"
